mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPACE ( SPACE_NO, HOST_ID, CATEGORY_NO, ADMIN_ID, SPACE_NAME, BIZ_REG_NUM, ADDRESS, DETAIL_ADDR, REGION, BANK_NAME, ACCOUNT_NO, ACCOUNT_HOLDER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{spaceNo}, #{hostId}, #{categoryNo}, #{adminId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{spaceName}, #{bizRegNum}, #{address}, #{detailAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region}, #{bankName}, #{accountNo}, #{accountHolder}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO SPACE_APPROVAL ( APPROVAL_NO, SPACE_NO, ADMIN_ID, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_SPACE_APPROVAL.NEXTVAL, #{spaceNo}, 1, 'PENDING', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO SPACE_UNIT ( UNIT_NO, SPACE_NO, TITLE, PRICE_PER_HOUR, MAX_CAPACITY, DESCRIPTION, THUMBNAIL_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{unitNo}, #{spaceNo}, #{unitTitle}, #{pricePerHour}, #{maxCapacity}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO SPACE_IMAGE ( IMAGE_NO, UNIT_NO, FILE_URL, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_SPACE_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{unitNo}, #{fileUrl}, #{sortOrder}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_NO categoryNo, NAME name FROM CATEGORY_SPACE ORDER BY CATEGORY_NO ASC
SELECT OPTION_NO optionNo, TYPE type, NAME name, ICON_URL iconUrl FROM SPACE_OPTION ORDER BY TYPE ASC, OPTION_NO ASC
